title: Compost Quest
pitch: Everything you kill rots into farmland — kite monsters so they die exactly where you want your loot-garden to grow.
howto: Call waves and kill enemies WHERE you want soil: corpses decay into patches and loot-plants grow there in real time, even while you're away. Clustered kills grow rarer plants. Harvest for Verdance, buy upgrades, and breed better decay strains from spores.
controls: Hold anywhere to move — your knight swings on his own. Tap glowing ripe plants to harvest. Buttons: Call Wave, Strain Lab, Upgrades.
